ci.template: Run the full CI suite with `cargo xtask ci`. Fix any errors that arise. Report the final pass/fail status.
ci.description: Run full CI and fix errors

test.template: Run `cargo test --all`. If any tests fail, diagnose and fix them. Report results.
test.description: Run all tests and fix failures

bench.template: Run `cargo bench --all` and report results. Compare against any saved baselines if available.

verify.template:
Run the full verification suite:
1. `cargo test --all`
2. `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
3. `cargo-machete`
Report pass/fail for each step. Fix any issues found.

check-file.template: Review the file $ARGUMENTS for correctness, clippy compliance, panic-free code (no unwrap/expect in production), and adherence to the rules in agents.md. Report any issues found.
check-file.description: Audit a single file against project rules

general.description: General-purpose sub-agent for focused implementation tasks. Uses Sonnet for cost-efficient parallel execution.

explore.description: Fast read-only agent for codebase exploration and analysis.
